chapter_title.en: Chapter on Lost Property and Stray Animals

text: 4058 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سَدِيرٍ قَالَ : سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَللُّقَطَةِ وَ أَنَا أَسْمَعُ فَقَالَ "تُعَرِّفُهَا سَنَةً فَإِنْ وَجَدْتَ صَاحِبَهَا وَ إِلاَّ فَأَنْتَ أَحَقُّ بِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4058 - It is narrated from Hanan ibn Sadir, who said: A man asked Abu Abdullah (as) about lost property while I was listening.
Imam (as) said: "Announce it for one year. If you find its owner, return it to him; otherwise, you are more entitled to keep it."
